0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h1","children":"Hermes Plugin"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"First-class integration with the Hermes agent framework."}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Install Profile Comparison"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Profile"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"When to use"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"RAM"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Key tradeoff"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":[["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne-memory"}]," (core)"]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Low-resource (Raspberry Pi, 1 GB VPS), or when using a remote embedding API"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~50 MB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["No local embeddings. Point ",["$","code",null,{"children":"MNEMOSYNE_EMBEDDING_API_URL"}]," to an external endpoint."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne-memory[embeddings]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Mid-range systems with local embedding support"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~800 MB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Adds ",["$","code",null,{"children":"fastembed"}]," for local vector generation. Best for single-user desktop agents."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne-memory[all]"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Full-featured — local embeddings + local LLM consolidation"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"~1.5 GB"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Adds ",["$","code",null,{"children":"sentence-transformers"}]," + local LLM deps. Maximum capability. Recommended for 8 GB+ RAM systems."]}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne-hermes"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Hermes Agent users — always pair with one of the above"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Same as base"}],["$","td",null,{"children":["Wraps core library with plugin manifest + entry points. Run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes config set memory.provider mnemosyne"}]," after install."]}]]}]]}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Hardware guidance:"}]," Core alone runs on a Raspberry Pi 4 (4 GB) with ~300 MB free for LLM. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[embeddings]"}]," needs at least 2 GB free RAM. ",["$","code",null,{"children":"[all]"}]," recommends 8 GB+."]}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Installation"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Do NOT install inside Hermes' managed venv"}]," — ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes update"}]," rebuilds\nthe venv and wipes extra packages. Use pipx (recommended) or a dedicated\nvirtualenv."]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# Recommended: survives Hermes updates\npipx install mnemosyne-hermes\nhermes config set memory.provider mnemosyne\nhermes gateway restart\n\n# For speed with pipx\nexport PIPX_DEFAULT_BACKEND=uv\npipx install mnemosyne-hermes\n\n# Upgrade\npipx upgrade mnemosyne-hermes\nhermes gateway restart\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Fallback: standalone venv"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"python3 -m venv ~/.hermes/mnemosyne-venv\n~/.hermes/mnemosyne-venv/bin/pip install mnemosyne-hermes\n~/.hermes/mnemosyne-venv/bin/mnemosyne-hermes install --force\nhermes config set memory.provider mnemosyne\nhermes gateway restart\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h3","children":"Disable legacy memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When Mnemosyne is active, disable Hermes' built-in MEMORY.md/USER.md storage\nto avoid duplication and token waste."}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":["DO NOT run ",["$","code",null,{"children":"hermes tools disable memory"}]]}]," — this kills Mnemosyne's tool\nsurface along with the built-in memory. The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"memory\""}]," toolset key gates\nboth the built-in tool AND memory provider tools (source: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"agent/agent_init.py:1068-1079"}],")."]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["Instead, add to ",["$","code",null,{"children":"~/.hermes/config.yaml"}],":"]}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"memory:\nmemory_enabled: false\nuser_profile_enabled: false\nprovider: mnemosyne\n","language":"yaml"}],"\n","$L4","\n","$L5","\n","$L6","\n","$L7","\n","$L8","\n","$L9","\n","$La","\n","$Lb","\n","$Lc","\n","$Ld","\n","$Le","\n","$Lf","\n","$L10","\n","$L11","\n","$L12","\n","$L13","\n","$L14","\n","$L15","\n","$L16"],["$L17"],"$L18"]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"zHG3ZR8juPPx4CXLmq1-_"}
4:["$","p",null,{"children":["The ",["$","code",null,{"children":"memory_enabled: false"}]," + ",["$","code",null,{"children":"user_profile_enabled: false"}]," disables\nthe built-in file-based memory store while keeping the ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"memory\""}]," toolset\nactive so Mnemosyne's tools surface correctly."]}]
5:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Auto-Context Injection"}]
6:["$","p",null,{"children":"When enabled, Mnemosyne automatically injects relevant memories into agent context:"}]
7:["$","$L19",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart LR\n  U[User Input] -->|query| M[Mnemosyne]\n  M -->|recall| C[Context Assembly]\n  C -->|inject| A[Agent Prompt]\n  A -->|respond| R[Response]\n  R -->|remember| M\n"}]
8:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Plugin Hooks"}]
9:["$","p",null,{"children":"Mnemosyne registers the following Hermes hooks:"}]
a:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Hook"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Timing"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Action"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_turn_start"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Start of each agent turn"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Prefetch identity + inject relevant memories"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_session_end"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Session close"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Trigger consolidation, store conversation summary"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"on_memory_write"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"After Hermes builtin memory writes"}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Sync to Mnemosyne for centralized recall"}]]}]]}]]}]
b:["$","$L2",null,{"as":"h2","children":"Tool Schema"}]

e:["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Tool"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Purpose"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Store a memory by ID"}]]}],["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_update"}]}],["$","td",null,{"children":"Update content or importance of an existing
